<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sĭng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:Vú-sṳ̂n]][[ja:戊申]][[ko:무신 (간지)]][[vi:Mậu Thân]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sin]][[zh-yue:戊申]][[zh:戊申]]

'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{拼音|wùshēn|qq=}}、{{注音|ㄨˋ ㄕㄣ|qq=}}、{{lang-ko|무신|qq=}}、{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|Mậu Thân|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by [[Yin Fire Goat]] and followed by [[Yin Earth Rooster]]. In the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the heavenly stem [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]] represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Monkey (戊申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (무신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Thân

==Years of Yang Earth Monkey==
A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Wushen'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
| 
* [[AD 48|48 AD]]
* [[AD 108|108 AD]]
* [[168|168 AD]]
* [[228|228 AD]]
* [[288|288 AD]]
* [[348|348 AD]]
* [[408|408 AD]]
* [[468|468 AD]]
* [[528|528 AD]]
* [[588|588 AD]]
* [[648|648 AD]]
* [[708|708 AD]]
* [[768|768 AD]]
* [[828|828 AD]]
* [[AD 888|888 AD]]
* [[948|948 AD]]
|-
| 
* [[1008|1008 AD]]
* [[1068|1068 AD]]
* [[1128|1128 AD]]
* [[1188|1188 AD]]
* [[1248|1248 AD]]
* [[1308|1308 AD]]
* [[1368|1368 AD]]
* [[1428|1428 AD]]
* [[1488|1488 AD]]
* [[1548|1548 AD]]
* [[1608|1608 AD]]
* [[1668|1668 AD]]
* [[1728|1728 AD]]
* [[1788|1788 AD]]
* [[1848|1848 AD]]
* [[1908|1908 AD]]
* [[1968|1968 AD]]
|-
| 
* [[2028|2028 AD]]
* [[2088 AD]]
* [[22nd century]]
* [[22nd century]]
* [[23rd century]]
* [[2328 AD]]
* [[2388 AD]]
* [[2448 AD]]
* [[2508 AD]]
* [[2568 AD]]
* [[2628 AD]]
* [[2688 AD]]
* [[2748 AD]]
* [[2808 AD]]
* [[2868 AD]]
* [[2928 AD]]
* [[2988 AD]]
|}
=== Events ===
* In [[Meiji era]] 41 (1908) – the issuance of the [[Q17641335]].
* In 1968 – the Tet Offensive during the [[Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sự kiện Tết Mậu Thân|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).

==Months of Yang Earth Monkey==
In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems [[Mizunoe (壬)]] and [[Hinoto (丁)]]), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, “month” may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[Liqiu|Risshū]] to the day before [[Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)

==Days of Yang Earth Monkey==
=== Date Selection ===
The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the [[Tenitsu-shin]].

== Related Articles ==
<!--Yang Earth Monkey--><!--Yang Earth Monkey-->

{{wikidata link|Q904781}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
